who: accounts payable supervisors in small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month
offer: For accounts payable supervisors in small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual tracking causes delays in resolving disputes. We provide weekly summaries instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem: Difficulty in tracking and resolving vendor disputes in a timely manner.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounts payable supervisors
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to accounts payable supervisors with demo video
Community forums where supervisors share tools
try_it: Let users try Email notifications and User-friendly dashboard for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
